items.title_en: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
items.title_zh: 人工智能的发展为科技投资者提供了关注债券市场的新理由
items.desc_en: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.

items.title_en: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
items.title_zh: SNAP 限制可能会改变购物者的购买方式——食品巨头正在关注
items.desc_en: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.
items.desc_zh: SNAP 食品限制正在蔓延到更多州，随着消费者将支出从苏打水、糖果和加工食品上转移，主要食品和饮料面临压力。

items.title_en: Goldman Sachs is betting that a recent merger will drive sharp gains for this travel stock
items.title_zh: 高盛押注最近的合并将推动这只旅游股票大幅上涨
items.desc_en: The bank this week upgraded the airline to buy from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 该银行本周将航空公司的评级从“中性”上调至“买入”。

items.desc_en: Bank of America reveals its top tech stocks heading into the second half.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行公布了进入下半年的顶级科技股。

items.title_en: Tourist dies in Dominican Republic luxury resort fire
items.title_zh: 游客在多米尼加共和国豪华度假村火灾中丧生
items.desc_en: Nearly 1,700 people were evacuated from the huge blaze at Viva Wyndham Dominicus Beach in Bayahibe, a popular resort town on the Caribbean coast.
items.desc_zh: 位于加勒比海岸热门度假小镇巴亚希贝的维瓦温德姆多米尼库斯海滩酒店发生大火，近 1,700 人被疏散。

items.title_en: Australia confirms first case of H5N1 bird flu as virus reaches every continent
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚确认首例 H5N1 禽流感病例，病毒已蔓延至各大洲
items.desc_en: Australia was previously the only continent where the H5N1 bird flu strain had not yet been found.
items.desc_zh: 澳大利亚此前是唯一尚未发现H5N1禽流感毒株的大陆。

items.title_en: African and Caribbean nations call for formal apology for transatlantic slavery
items.title_zh: 非洲和加勒比国家呼吁对跨大西洋奴隶制正式道歉
items.desc_en: The leaders have asked for apologies from the countries that benefited from the slave trade, as well as debt relief and financial compensation.
items.desc_zh: 领导人要求从奴隶贸易中受益的国家道歉，并要求减免债务和经济补偿。

items.title_en: New video game console aims to get kids moving
items.title_zh: 新视频游戏机旨在让孩子们动起来
items.desc_en: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
items.desc_zh: 这款立方体形状的游戏机将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.title_en: James Burrows, legendary director of Cheers and Friends, dies aged 85
items.title_zh: 《干杯与朋友》传奇导演詹姆斯·伯罗斯去世，享年 85 岁
items.desc_en: Best-known as co-creator of sitcom Cheers, Burrows directed more than 1,000 episodes of other classics including the Big Bang Theory and Will and Grace.
items.desc_zh: 伯罗斯以情景喜剧《Cheers》的联合创作者而闻名，他还执导了 1,000 多集其他经典剧集，包括《生活大爆炸》和《威尔与格蕾丝》。

items.title_en: Zelensky stripped of highest Polish honour over WW2 name of army unit
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基因二战陆军单位名称被剥夺波兰最高荣誉
items.desc_en: Ukraine has denounced the move, calling it a "strategic mistake" and "disrespectful".
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰谴责此举，称其为“战略错误”和“不尊重”。

items.title_en: Trump unveils the new Air Force One, a converted Qatari jet
items.title_zh: 特朗普推出了新的空军一号，这是一架改装的卡塔尔喷气式飞机
items.desc_en: The gift from Qatar is serving as a so-called "bridge" aircraft to carry the president until the new planes ordered directly from Boeing arrive.
items.desc_zh: 来自卡塔尔的礼物是一架所谓的“桥梁”飞机，用于运送总统，直到直接从波音公司订购的新飞机抵达。

items.title_en: Trump tells Axios he no longer views Anthropic as a national security threat
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉 Axios，他不再将 Anthropic 视为国家安全威胁
items.desc_en: Anthropic last week disabled access to its most advanced models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, after Trump ordered it to block foreign ​nationals from accessing them.
items.desc_zh: 在特朗普下令禁止外国人访问其最先进的游戏《神鬼寓言 5》和《神话 5》后，Anthropic 上周禁止其访问这些游戏。

items.title_en: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund
items.title_zh: 司法部拒绝法官以书面形式提出不会推进“反武器化”基金的请求
items.desc_en: The DOJ in May announced it was creating the fund as part of a settlement of President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service.
items.desc_zh: 美国司法部 5 月宣布设立该基金，作为唐纳德·特朗普总统针对国税局 100 亿美元诉讼的和解协议的一部分。

items.desc_en: The US says South Africa is not doing enough to protect the white-minority Afrikaner community.

items.title_en: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
items.title_zh: 内存危机达到如此极端“连苹果也不能安全”
items.desc_en: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.
items.desc_zh: 苹果似乎准备采取罕见的涨价举措，以应对首席执行官蒂姆·库克所说的“不可持续”的内存短缺问题。

items.title_en: GTA 6 - all you need to know about Rockstar's blockbuster game
items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.
items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。

items.title_en: Musk's SpaceX stake is worth over $1 trillion. Here are the other billionaire shareholders
items.title_zh: 马斯克持有的 SpaceX 股份价值超过 1 万亿美元。以下是其他亿万富翁股东
items.desc_en: SpaceX shares were up 37% after its historic debut last week, which offered shares at a set price of $135.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 上周以 135 美元的定价发行股票，历史性地首次亮相，股价上涨 37%。

items.title_en: Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi to stand trial for rape
items.title_zh: 摩洛哥队长阿什拉夫·哈基米因强奸罪受审
items.desc_en: French prosecutors confirm Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi will stand trial for rape, in accusations dating back to 2023.
items.desc_zh: 法国检察官确认摩洛哥队长阿什拉夫·哈基米 (Achraf Hakimi) 将以强奸罪接受审判，指控可追溯到 2023 年。

items.title_en: Boy, 12, wins hearts after trying to check sick chicken into Ethiopian hospital
items.title_zh: 12岁男孩试图将病鸡送进埃塞俄比亚医院，赢得了人们的心
items.desc_en: Markos's beloved hen was not responding to any treatments - so he did the only thing he could think of.
items.desc_zh: 马科斯心爱的母鸡对任何治疗都没有反应，所以他做了他唯一能想到的事情。

items.title_en: Zimbabwe MPs pass bill to extend president's time in power
items.title_zh: 津巴布韦国会议员通过延长总统执政时间的法案
items.desc_en: The proposal would extend Emmerson Mnangagwa's term by two years and scrap direct presidential elections.
items.desc_zh: 该提案将把埃默森·姆南加古瓦的任期延长两年，并取消总统直接选举。

items.title_en: The artificial ice pyramids saving India's mountain villages
items.title_zh: 人造冰金字塔拯救了印度的山村
items.desc_en: Himalayan villages are creating artificial glaciers to guarantee water for their crops in the spring.
items.desc_zh: 喜马拉雅山的村庄正在建造人工冰川，以保证春季农作物的用水。

items.title_en: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
items.title_zh: 照片中：众星云集，庆祝奥巴马总统中心落成
items.desc_en: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.
items.desc_zh: 巴拉克·奥巴马 (Barack Obama) 在芝加哥开设了他的总统中心，前总统、名人和政要出席了仪式。唐纳德·特朗普总统缺席。

items.title_en: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.title_zh: Amon创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.title_en: Google, Nvidia and Anthropic bosses' AI tips for students
items.title_zh: 谷歌、英伟达和 Anthropic 老板给学生的人工智能建议
items.desc_en: Sundar Pichai, Jensen Huang and Jack Clark share their advice with the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai)、黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 和杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 与 BBC 分享了他们的建议。

items.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题

items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_zh: Helium-3 是什么？我们可以从月球上获取它吗？

items.desc_zh: Hel-3 价格昂贵，而且需求预计会猛增，因此一些人计划在月球上开采它。

items.title_zh: 从 2027 年初起，16 岁以下青少年将被禁止使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: Sites including Instagram, YouTube and TikTok will become inaccessible for millions of children, the prime minister has announced.
items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。

items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令——大胆而直率，但没有灵丹妙药

items.desc_zh: BBC 技术编辑佐伊·克莱曼 (Zoe Kleinman) 讲述年轻人上网即将发生的重大变化。

items.title_zh: 英国针对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体禁令是什么？
items.desc_en: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat blocked for UK teens early in 2027.
items.desc_zh: 这些措施将使英国青少年在 2027 年初屏蔽 TikTok 和 Snapchat 等应用程序。
